zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Welles於1360年出生在英國林可爾史爾格萊斯比時，她的父親John Welles 4th Lord Welles26歲，母親Maude de Ros28歲。她於1379年6月17日與James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年11月13日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼享年37歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Welles于1360年出生在英国林可爾史爾格萊斯比时，她的父亲John Welles 4th Lord Welles26岁，母亲Maude de Ros28岁。她于1379年6月17日与James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年11月13日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼享年37岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Welles was born in 1360, in Grainsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, was 26 and her mother, Maude de Ros, was 28. She married James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond on 17 June 1379, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 November 1397, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 37, and was buried in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Welles est née en 1360, à Grainsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maude de Ros, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond le 17 juin 1379, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1397, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Welles 1360 in Grainsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Welles 4th Lord Welles 26 und ihre Mutter Maude de Ros 28. Sie hat am 17. Juni 1379 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. November 1397 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Welles è nata il nel 1360 nel Grainsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Maude de Ros, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond il 17 giugno 1379, nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1397, nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Wellesが1360年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレインスビーで生まれた時，父John Welles 4th Lord Wellesは26歳，母Maude de Rosは28歳であった。1379年6月17日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーでJames Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年11月13日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで37歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーゴウランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Welles(이)가 1360년 영국 링코실르 그레이스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Welles 4th Lord Welles(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude de Ros(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1379년 6월 17일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 11월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 가란에 묻혔다.

mn.Skendleby, Lincolnshire, England: Skendleby, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Welles nasceu em 1360, em Grainsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Ros, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond em 17 de junho de 1379, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1397, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Welles родилась в 1360 г. в местности греинсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Welles 4th Lord Welles было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Ros, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond 17 июня 1379 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 ноября 1397 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности гоуран, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Welles nació en 1360, en Grainsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maude de Ros, tenía 28 años. Se casó con James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond el 17 de junio de 1379, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1397, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
